Our Core Specialties

Providing authoritative legal representation across critical legal areas in Jodhpur and Rajasthan High Court.

Key Focus Areas:

  • ✓ Mutual & Contested Divorce
  • ✓ Child Custody & Guardianship
  • ✓ Maintenance & Alimony Claims
  • ✓ Domestic Violence Protection
Consult Details →

Family Law

Compassionate and highly professional representation in divorce, child custody, and family disputes.

Open Law Book →

Key Focus Areas:

  • ✓ Contract & Summary Suits
  • ✓ Partnership & JV Disputes
  • ✓ Pre-Institution Mediation
  • ✓ Arbitration Enforcement
Consult Details →

Commercial Courts

Expert representation in high-value commercial suits, business contract disputes, and partnership claims.

Open Law Book →

Key Focus Areas:

  • ✓ Property & Partition Suits
  • ✓ Specific Contract Performance
  • ✓ Injunctions & Stay Petitions
  • ✓ Title & Possession Claims
Consult Details →

Civil Litigation

Expert civil suit counsel on property division, partition, contracts, and execution of decrees.

Open Law Book →

Key Focus Areas:

  • ✓ Bail & Anticipatory Bail
  • ✓ FIR Quashings (Section 482)
  • ✓ Trial Defense Representations
  • ✓ High Court Appeals & Quashings
Consult Details →

Criminal Defense

Dedicated defense representation, FIR quashings, trial advocacy, and High Court appeals.

View All Practice Areas

Recent Court Victories

Review our latest landmark judgments, bails allowed, and trial acquittals compiled directly from our database records.

State of Rajasthan v. Verma - wrongful Dismissal Reinstated

Successfully contested the termination of a senior government officer. The High Court ordered complete reinstatement with retrospective seniority rights and full back-wages.

View Judgments List →

Secured Anticipatory Bail in Dowry Harassment Allegation (Section 498-A)

Successfully argued for anticipatory bail before the High Court for the husband's immediate family members, demonstrating a lack of specific allegations in the complaint.

View Judgments List →

Retrospective Promotion & Pensionary Benefits Decreed - CAT Jodhpur

Obtained a favorable judgment in the Central Administrative Tribunal directing department heads to grant retrospective promotion and release delayed pension amounts with interest.

View Judgments List →

Our Advocates

Carrying forward a distinguished family legacy of legal brilliance, high discipline, and dedicated advocacy in the Rajasthan High Court.

Founder & Inspiration

Adv. Late Shri Mohan Lal Kala

Legacy of Excellence since 1973

A pioneer in matrimonial and civil law, author of 'Hindu Marriage Act 1955' and former Chief Editor of Writ Law Reporter.

Advocate

Dr. Shailendra Kala

LL.M., Ph.D. (Family Laws) | Practicing since 1994

Specializes in matrimonial disputes, family legal representation, and civil appellate matters in Jodhpur.

Advocate

Advocate Anuj Kala

B.Com., C.A., C.S., LL.M. | Practicing since 1998

Handles high-stakes civil suits, commercial tax matters, arbitration disputes, and service litigation in Jodhpur High Court.

A visual look inside our physical Jodhpur offices, residential study chambers, and conference setups.
